# cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_class (Data Source)

Accepted Permissions

- `Zero Trust Read`
- `Zero Trust Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_class" "example_zero_trust_dlp_data_class" {
  account_id = "account_id"
  data_class_id = "182bd5e5-6e1a-4fe4-a799-aa6d9a6ab26e"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `data_class_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `data_tags` (List of String)
- `description` (String)
- `expression` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `sensitivity_levels` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sensitivity_levels))
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--sensitivity_levels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sensitivity_levels`

Read-Only:

- `group_id` (String)
- `level_id` (String)
